subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Asdaq! Upon thee rest My glory, and upon him be My glory and My mercy and My loving-kindness. The divine attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن اسمی الاصدق علیک بهائی و علیه بهائی و رحمتی و عنایتی انشاء الله شونات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach
